body:
In this PR I have

- added types to dispatch over different dust types
- added some simple unit tests for the activated fraction
- moved the remaining code to the cirrus box model
- added the boilerplate code needed to have access to CloudMicrophysics and CLIMAParameters in the cirrus box model

Next steps:

- cleanup the documentation to describe the added code (move the rest of the notes somewhere else - overleaf? planning SDI?)
- can we reproduce any figures from the Mohler paper and add it to the docs?
- add more simple tests
- work on cleaning up the cirrus box model. If necessary add more functions to the IceNucleation mdule
title: activated fraction clanup
